summary: Planning from the hydrated cluster artifact. No GitHub mutations are allowed in plan mode; the action matrix keeps #58968 as canonical, treats #72653 as related but not duplicate, and routes #80147 because the job explicitly designates it as a security-signal ref requiring central security handling.

actions.reason: #58968 remains the clearest open issue for the remote Playwright tab enumeration timeout root cause.
#72653 is in the same browser/CDP timeout family but has broader all-action Ubuntu external-CDP symptoms and lacks a proven same root cause, so it should not be closed as a duplicate of #58968.
The job explicitly designates this exact PR as a security-signal ref requiring route_security, so it is quarantined without blocking non-security classification of #58968 and #72653.
